medialive.channel.nielsennaesiinw.CfnAbo:
Complete these fields only if you want to insert watermarks of type Nielsen NAES II (N2) and Nielsen NAES VI (NW).

The parent of this entity is NielsenWatermarksSettings.

medialive.channel.nielsennaesiinw.CheckD.Description: Enter the check digit string for the watermark

medialive.channel.nielsennaesiinw.Sid.Description: Enter the Nielsen Source ID (SID) to include in the watermark
